title: Predicting Car Prices with Statistical Machine Learning
description: A flowchart illustrating the process of using statistical machine learning models to predict car prices from raw data.
elements: Model Selection (e.g., Linear Regression, Random Forest)
relationships: Raw Car Data is processed through Data Preprocessing and Feature Engineering to create a clean dataset
The clean dataset is used to train a selected Model, resulting in a Trained Predictive Model
New Car Feature Input is fed into the Trained Predictive Model to generate a Predicted Price Output
